auth.invalidCredentials: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkEmailSignup: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to verify your account.
auth.checkEmailAutoVerify: Once verified, this page will take you to the app automatically.
auth.checkEmailSpam: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or try signing up again.
auth.checkEmailReset: If an account exists for {email}, we sent a password reset link.
auth.checkEmailGoogle: Signed in with Google? Just use Continue with Google on the sign-in page instead.
auth.emailVerifiedMessage: Your email has been confirmed. You can close this tab and return to the one where you signed up.
auth.inviteCodeDescription: You should have received a code in your email. Enter it below to create your account.
auth.invalidInviteCode: This code is incorrect or has expired. Double-check and try again.
auth.signInError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.signUpError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.alreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
auth.inviteExpired: This invite has expired. Ask your landlord to resend it.
auth.inviteInvalid: This invite link is invalid. Check with whoever sent it to you.

pwa.installDescription: Add mabenn to your home screen for the best experience.
pwa.installIosSafari: Tap the share button, then "Add to Home Screen".
pwa.installIosChrome: Tap the share button, then "Add to Home Screen". For the best experience, use Safari.
pwa.installIosOther: Open this page in Safari, then tap the share button and "Add to Home Screen".

landing.heroTitle: Billing clarity for landlords and tenants.
landing.heroSubtitle: Replace spreadsheets and email threads with a shared billing workspace everyone can trust.
landing.heroNote: Be the first to know when we launch.
landing.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! Check your email for confirmation.
landing.step1Description: Add your units, set up rent and bills, invite your tenants.
landing.step2Description: Email or upload utility bills. We pull out the numbers for you to review.
landing.step3Description: Review, approve, and share a clear breakdown every month.
landing.step4Description: Every charge has a source. Tenants can see where it came from and ask questions.
landing.testimonialQuote: Finally, my tenants stopped texting me asking what they owe.
landing.landlordBenefit1: Manage multiple properties from one place
landing.landlordBenefit2: Bills are read automatically — just review and approve
landing.landlordBenefit3: Publish clear statements tenants can trust
landing.tenantBenefit1: See exactly what you owe and why
landing.tenantBenefit2: See the original bill behind each charge
landing.tenantBenefit4: Flag questions — no more awkward messages
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the waitlist and be first in line.

home.iOwnPropertyDescription: Set up your property, invite tenants, and manage billing.
home.iRentPropertyDescription: View statements, track payments, and coordinate with roommates.
home.comingSoonDescription: Tenant onboarding is coming soon. For now, ask your landlord to invite you through mabenn.
home.roleNote: You can always add more properties in either role later.
home.pendingInviteSingular: A tenant is waiting to join
home.pendingInviteDescription: Your invite is pending. You can resend it.
home.actionInviteTenantsDescription: They'll see exactly what they owe and why.
home.actionSetUpChargesDescription: Define rent, utilities, and recurring fees.
home.actionPublishStatementDescription: Review and share this month's charges.
home.statusBillsPending: {count, plural, one {# bill pending} other {# bills pending}}
home.awaitingBillsWithDueDate: {count, plural, one {Awaiting # bill} other {Awaiting # bills}} · due {date}

rentDates.endDateBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.

properties.whereIsPropertyDescription: We'll use this address to organize your billing.
properties.propertyNameHint: Optional — we'll use the address if left blank.
properties.postalCodeNotFound: CEP not found. Please fill in the address manually.
properties.addressHint: We'll auto-fill the rest of the address from your CEP.
properties.unitsExplanation: A unit is an individual rental space within your property — like an apartment, room, or house.
properties.singleUnit: This property has just one unit
properties.atLeastOneUnit: Add at least one unit to continue.
properties.inviteDescription: When tenants are on mabenn, they see exactly what they owe and why — no more back-and-forth about bills. You can always invite them later too.
properties.alreadyInvited: This tenant has already been invited to this unit.
properties.setupCompleteMessage: {name} is set up with {unitCount, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}}. You can now set up charges or explore your new property.
properties.setupCompleteSimple: {name} has been created and is ready to go.
properties.chargesTitle: What charges does this property have?
properties.chargesDescription: Select all that apply. You can always add more later.
properties.amountBehaviorFixedHint: Same amount every month, added to statements automatically.
properties.amountBehaviorVariableHint: Amount comes from your bills each month.
properties.tenantsInvited: {count, plural, one {# tenant invited} other {# tenants invited}}
properties.chargesConfigured: {count, plural, one {# charge configured} other {# charges configured}}
properties.duplicateAddress: You already have a property at this address.
properties.createFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
properties.inviteFailed: Failed to send invite. Please try again.
properties.partialFailure: Property created, but some invites or charges failed. You can set them up from the property page.

propertyDetail.variableCharges: {count, plural, one {# variable charge} other {# variable charges}}
propertyDetail.dueDay: Due on the {day}th of each month
propertyDetail.alreadyInvited: This email has already been invited.
propertyDetail.inviteFailed: Failed to send invite. Try again.
propertyDetail.cancelInviteConfirm: This will cancel the invitation. The tenant won't be able to join with this invite.
propertyDetail.removeTenantConfirm: This will remove the tenant's access to this unit. They won't be able to view statements or charges.
propertyDetail.missingCharges: {count, plural, one {# expected charge missing} other {# expected charges missing}}
propertyDetail.dueInDays: Due in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
propertyDetail.completenessHint: Missing charges won't block publishing. You can revise the statement later.
propertyDetail.paymentDueMonthly: Payment due the {day} of each month
propertyDetail.removeChargeConfirm: Remove this charge from the statement?
propertyDetail.billNudge: Attaching the bill helps your tenant verify this charge.
propertyDetail.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {max}MB.
propertyDetail.billRemovedOnSave: Bill will be removed when you save.

propertyCreation.title: Setting up your property

property.title: Property
property.subtitle: Where is it and what type?

rent-dates.title: Rent & dates
rent-dates.subtitle: Amount, due day, and contract period.
rent-dates.placeholder: Rent and dates form coming soon.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Invite the people who will live here.
tenants.inviteToggleHelper: We'll email them when you create the property.

emptyState.title: Add the people who live here
emptyState.leadIn: Once you do, mabenn will automatically:
emptyState.bulletPayments: Track every payment and show what's still owed
emptyState.bulletReminders: Remind tenants when rent is due
emptyState.bulletLateNotices: Send late notices on your behalf

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Utilities, condo fees, and who pays them.
expenses.amountHelperFixed: How much you pay each month.
expenses.amountHelperVariable: Optional — we'll fill it in from your bills.
expenses.amountHelperUnknown: Optional — we'll learn the pattern as bills come in.

amountBehavior.fixedDescription: Same amount each month — internet, condo, insurance.
amountBehavior.variableDescription: Amount comes from the bill — utilities like electricity, water, gas.
amountBehavior.unknownTrigger: We'll detect it from your bills
amountBehavior.unknownDescription: We'll learn the pattern as bills come in.

emptyState.title: Track every recurring charge
emptyState.leadIn: Add every recurring charge for this property — even ones your tenant pays. mabenn will:
emptyState.bulletTracking: Watch for utility, condo, and other bills automatically
emptyState.bulletPayments: Match incoming payments to the right charge
emptyState.bulletResponsibility: Figure out who pays what once bills start coming in

tax-id.title: Tax ID
tax-id.subtitle: We use this to keep billing tied to you.
tax-id.editingDescription: Changing this will update your profile.

validation.invalidTaxId: That doesn't look like a valid CPF or CNPJ.
validation.tax_id_conflict: This tax ID is already registered to another account.

whyWeAsk.title: Why we ask
whyWeAsk.bulletTrackingBR: We catch any boleto issued in your name — condo fees, property tax, the rest — so they never go missing.
whyWeAsk.bulletTrackingFallback: We help track any bills issued in your name.
whyWeAsk.bulletRouting: When a bill comes through, we know whether it's yours or the tenant's.
whyWeAsk.bulletDocuments: It appears on the rent receipts and contracts mabenn generates for you.
whyWeAsk.privacyLink: How we keep your information safe

cta.remaining: {count, plural, one {# section left} other {# sections left}}
cta.hint: Complete the required sections to create the property.

review.title: Review what we found
review.description: Here's what we extracted from your contract. Editing comes in the next step.
review.noExpenses: No expenses found in this contract.
review.startOverConfirm: This will clear everything you've uploaded. Continue?

recovery.title: We couldn't find your contract data
recovery.description: Your previous upload may have been cleared. Try uploading again.

empty.title: We couldn't extract much from this contract
empty.description: Try uploading a different file or continue with manual setup.

exitPrompt.title: Keep your progress?
exitPrompt.description: Your work is saved on this device. Pick up where you left off any time, or discard it and start over.

upload.title: Upload your rental contract
upload.description: We'll read it and fill in the rest.
upload.noContractToast: Manual setup is coming soon. For now, upload your contract to continue.

file_too_large.title: File too large
file_too_large.message: Your contract is larger than 10 MB.

unsupported_format.title: Unsupported format
unsupported_format.message: Only PDF and DOCX are supported.

no_text_extractable.title: No readable text
no_text_extractable.message: We couldn't find any text. Is this a scanned document?

password_protected.title: Password-protected file
password_protected.cta: Remove the password and try again

unsupported_language.title: Language not supported
unsupported_language.message: We don't support contracts in this language yet.

not_a_contract.title: Not a rental contract
not_a_contract.message: This doesn't look like a rental contract.

extraction_failed.title: Something went wrong
extraction_failed.message: Something went wrong on our side.

api_key_missing.title: Extraction unavailable
api_key_missing.message: We're having trouble reaching our extraction service. Try again later.

errors.duplicate_address: You already have a property at this address.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again to continue.
errors.idempotency_owner_mismatch: This wizard session can't be reused on another account. Start a fresh one.
errors.rpc_constraint_violation: We couldn't save this property because something doesn't line up. Review your entries and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

propertyCreation.resumeUnavailable: Your progress may not be saved on this device.

success.title: Property created.
success.subtitle: Bills and payments for this property will be tracked automatically when activity arrives.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.invited: {count, plural, one {# invitation sent} other {# invitations sent}}
tenants.deferred: {count, plural, one {# saved for later} other {# saved for later}}
tenants.emailFailed: {count, plural, one {# invitation email didn't send} other {# invitation emails didn't send}}

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.tracked: {count, plural, one {# expense tracked} other {# expenses tracked}}

providerRequests.title: New providers
providerRequests.note: We're adding support for one or more of your providers. We'll let you know once automatic tracking is available.
providerRequests.billUploadFailed: {count, plural, one {# bill upload didn't finish} other {# bill uploads didn't finish}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.paymentDescription: Configure your payment details for tenant billing.
settings.emailDescription: Linked to your sign-in. Not editable here.
settings.taxIdDescription: Used to recognize bills issued in your name and on receipts and contracts.

validation.invalidTaxId: That doesn't look like a valid CPF or CNPJ.
validation.cnpjNotFound: We couldn't find that CNPJ. Double-check the number.
validation.cnpjVerificationUnavailable: We couldn't verify that CNPJ right now. Try again in a moment.
validation.updateFailed: We couldn't save that. Try again.
